message:
feat(mermaid): add packet-beta parser, layout, and renderer

- Parse packet-beta body: field definitions with bit ranges and labels
  (e.g. `0-15: "Source Port"`) and single-bit fields
- Add Statement::PacketField variant with IR type IrPacketField
- Layout: fixed grid with rows of bits_per_row (default 32), fields placed
  at exact bit positions with proportional widths
- Render: box-drawing grid with bit ruler, field borders, centered labels
- Update compatibility matrix: PacketBeta -> Supported
- Update fixture tests with proper packet statement counting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -99,6 +99,9 @@ fn make_ir(
         quadrant_x_axis: None,
         quadrant_y_axis: None,
         quadrant_labels: [None, None, None, None],
+        packet_fields: Vec::new(),
+        packet_title: None,
+        packet_bits_per_row: 32,
     }
 }
